page_metadata.biotools__summary: GlycoPP is a webserver for predicting potential N-and O-glycosites in prokaryotic protein sequence(s), where N-glycosite is an Asn residue and O-glycosite could be a serine or threonine residue having a glycan attached covalently and enzymatically at amide or hydroxyl group respectively.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GlycoPP is a webserver for predicting potential N-and O-glycosites in prokaryotic protein sequence(s), where N-glycosite is an Asn residue and O-glycosite could be a serine or threonine residue having a glycan attached covalently and enzymatically at amide or hydroxyl group respectively.
